name: Alchemist
description: Masters of alchemy who craft bombs and potent elixirs. Alchemists use explosives and transmutation to devastate foes and enhance allies.

classFeatures.name: Alchemy
classFeatures.description: Create alchemical items and mutagens.

classFeatures.name: Bomb
classFeatures.description: Create ranged weapons using alchemical force.

classFeatures.name: Poison Use
classFeatures.description: Trained in use of poisons without poisoning yourself.

classFeatures.name: Mutagen
classFeatures.description: Create potions that grant supernatural enhancements.

name: Arcanist
description: Skilled arcane casters who blend wizardry and sorcery. Arcanists gain exploits and can spontaneously cast known spells.

classFeatures.name: Arcane Reservoir
classFeatures.description: Store arcane power in a reservoir for special abilities.

classFeatures.name: Arcane Exploits
classFeatures.description: Gain powerful exploits to modify spellcasting.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast both prepared and spontaneous arcane spells.

classFeatures.name: Fast Movement
classFeatures.description: Barbarian's base speed is 10 feet faster than normal.

classFeatures.name: Rage
classFeatures.description: Gain bonuses to Str/Con and Will saves while raging.

classFeatures.name: Rage Power
classFeatures.description: Gain a rage power to use while raging.

classFeatures.name: Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be caught flat-footed and retains Dex bonus when invisible enemy attacks.

classFeatures.name: Trap Sense
classFeatures.description: Gain bonus on Reflex saves against traps and AC vs trap attacks.

classFeatures.name: Improved Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be flanked unless attacker has 4+ more rogue levels.

classFeatures.name: Damage Reduction
classFeatures.description: Reduce all weapon damage taken by 1.

classFeatures.name: Greater Rage
classFeatures.description: Rage bonuses increase to +6 Str/Con and +3 Will.

classFeatures.name: Indomitable Will
classFeatures.description: Gain +4 bonus on Will saves against enchantment while raging.

classFeatures.name: Tireless Rage
classFeatures.description: No longer become fatigued at the end of rage.

classFeatures.name: Mighty Rage
classFeatures.description: Rage bonuses increase to +8 Str/Con and +4 Will.

classFeatures.name: Spells
classFeatures.description: Bard can cast arcane spells from the bard spell list.

classFeatures.name: Bardic Knowledge
classFeatures.description: Add half class level to all Knowledge checks and make them untrained.

classFeatures.name: Bardic Performance
classFeatures.description: Use Perform skill to create magical effects for 4 + Cha mod rounds per day.

classFeatures.name: Countersong
classFeatures.description: Counter magic effects that depend on sound.

classFeatures.name: Distraction
classFeatures.description: Counter magic effects that depend on sight.

classFeatures.name: Fascinate
classFeatures.description: Fascinate one or more creatures with performance.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Courage
classFeatures.description: Inspire allies with +1 bonus vs fear and damage.

classFeatures.name: Versatile Performance
classFeatures.description: Use Perform bonus in place of related skill bonus.

classFeatures.name: Well-Versed
classFeatures.description: +4 bonus on saves against bardic performance and sonic effects.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Competence
classFeatures.description: Help an ally succeed at a skill check.

classFeatures.name: Lore Master
classFeatures.description: Can take 10 on any Knowledge check once per day.

classFeatures.name: Suggestion
classFeatures.description: Make a reasonable suggestion that targets will follow.

classFeatures.name: Move Action Performance
classFeatures.description: Start bardic performance as a move action instead of a standard action.

classFeatures.name: Dirge of Doom
classFeatures.description: Use performance to cause enemies within 30 feet to become shaken.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Greatness
classFeatures.description: Inspire allies with extra hit dice and bonuses.

classFeatures.name: Jack-of-All-Trades
classFeatures.description: Use any skill even if untrained. At 16th level, all skills are class skills. At 19th level, take 10 on any skill.

classFeatures.name: Soothing Performance
classFeatures.description: Create an effect equivalent to mass cure serious wounds using performance.

classFeatures.name: Swift Action Performance
classFeatures.description: Start bardic performance as a swift action.

classFeatures.name: Frightening Tune
classFeatures.description: Use performance to cause fear in enemies within 30 feet.

classFeatures.name: Inspire Heroics
classFeatures.description: Inspired creatures gain +4 morale bonus on saving throws and +4 dodge bonus to AC.

classFeatures.name: Mass Suggestion
classFeatures.description: Make a suggestion simultaneously to any number of fascinated creatures.

classFeatures.name: Deadly Performance
classFeatures.description: Use performance to cause one enemy to die of joy or sorrow (Fort save negates).

name: Bloodrager
description: Fighters touched by bloodline magic who rage like barbarians. Bloodragers gain spell casting and bloodline powers while raging.

classFeatures.name: Bloodrager Bloodline
classFeatures.description: Gain power from a magical bloodline.

classFeatures.name: Bloodrage
classFeatures.description: Enter rage fueled by bloodline magic.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Bloodline Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a feat based on your bloodline.

name: Brawler
description: Martial experts trained in unarmed combat and improvised weapons. Brawlers gain martial flexibility to switch styles mid-combat.

classFeatures.name: Martial Flexibility
classFeatures.description: Change combat feats as swift actions.

classFeatures.name: Unarmed Strike
classFeatures.description: Increased damage with unarmed strikes.

name: Cavalier
description: Noble mounted warriors bound by oath to their order. Cavaliers gain powerful charge abilities and teamwork feats with allies.

classFeatures.name: Order
classFeatures.description: Swear oath to an order.

classFeatures.name: Mounted Bond
classFeatures.description: Form special bond with a mount.

classFeatures.name: Cavalier's Charge
classFeatures.description: Gain bonuses when charging from horseback.

classFeatures.name: Aura
classFeatures.description: Emit an aura of power around the Cleric.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells prepared from cleric spell list.

classFeatures.name: Channel Energy
classFeatures.description: Channel positive/negative energy to heal or harm.

classFeatures.name: Domains
classFeatures.description: Choose two domains granting additional powers and bonus spells.

classFeatures.name: Orisons
classFeatures.description: Can prepare unlimited 0-level spells.

classFeatures.name: Spontaneous Casting
classFeatures.description: Convert prepared spells into cure or inflict spells spontaneously.

restrictions: Cannot wear metal armor or use metal shields

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells from druid spell list.

classFeatures.name: Druidic
classFeatures.description: Can read, write, and speak Druidic.

classFeatures.name: Orisons
classFeatures.description: Can prepare unlimited 0-level spells.

classFeatures.name: Nature Bond
classFeatures.description: Form a bond with nature (animal companion or domain).

classFeatures.name: Nature Sense
classFeatures.description: Know direction and determine pure water by smell.

classFeatures.name: Wild Empathy
classFeatures.description: Improve attitude of animals with Charisma check.

classFeatures.name: Woodland Stride
classFeatures.description: Move through natural difficult terrain normally.

classFeatures.name: Trackless Step
classFeatures.description: Leave no track when moving through natural terrain.

classFeatures.name: Resist Nature's Lure
classFeatures.description: +4 bonus on saving throws against the spell-like and supernatural abilities of fey and plant creatures.

classFeatures.name: Wild Shape
classFeatures.description: Transform into a Small or Medium animal once per day. Uses increase every 2 levels.

classFeatures.name: Venom Immunity
classFeatures.description: Immune to all poisons.

classFeatures.name: A Thousand Faces
classFeatures.description: Change appearance at will as if using alter self.

classFeatures.name: Timeless Body
classFeatures.description: No longer takes ability score penalties for aging.

classFeatures.name: Wild Shape (at will)
classFeatures.description: Can use wild shape at will.

name: Fighter
features: Bonus Combat Feat (1st, every even level)

classFeatures.name: Bonus Combat Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus combat feat at 1st level and every even level thereafter.

classFeatures.name: Bravery
classFeatures.description: +1 bonus on Will saves against fear. Increases by +1 every 4 levels beyond 2nd.

classFeatures.name: Armor Training
classFeatures.description: Reduce armor check penalty by 1 and increase max Dex bonus by 1. Improves every 4 levels.

classFeatures.name: Weapon Training
classFeatures.description: Select a weapon group and gain +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls. Additional groups at 9th, 13th, 17th.

classFeatures.name: Armor Mastery
classFeatures.description: Gain DR 5/— whenever wearing armor or using a shield.

classFeatures.name: Weapon Mastery
classFeatures.description: Choose one weapon. Attacks auto-confirm critical hits, damage multiplier increases by 1, cannot be disarmed.

name: Hunter
description: Wilderness warriors with animal companion and spellcasting. Hunters combine ranger versatility with druid animal bond abilities.

classFeatures.name: Animal Companion
classFeatures.description: Form bond with animal companion.

classFeatures.name: Wild Empathy
classFeatures.description: Communicate and influence animals.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells.

name: Inquisitor
description: Holy agents of faith who hunt heresy and punish the wicked. Inquisitors gain judgments and specialized combat abilities.

classFeatures.name: Monster Lore
classFeatures.description: Bonus to knowledge checks about creatures.

classFeatures.name: Judgment
classFeatures.description: Grant yourself divine bonuses for 1 minute.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells.

name: Investigator
description: Brilliant detectives and scholars with investigative talents. Investigators gain alchemy talents and deduction bonus.

classFeatures.name: Keen Recollection
classFeatures.description: Make knowledge checks untrained.

classFeatures.name: Investigator Talents
classFeatures.description: Gain special investigative abilities.

classFeatures.name: Alchemy
classFeatures.description: Create alchemical items.

restrictions: Loses AC bonus, fast movement, and flurry of blows when wearing armor or using a shield

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus feat at 1st, 2nd, and every 4 levels thereafter (6th, 10th, 14th, 18th).

classFeatures.name: Flurry of Blows
classFeatures.description: Make additional attacks as a full-attack action with unarmed strikes or monk weapons.

classFeatures.name: Stunning Fist
classFeatures.description: Gain Stunning Fist as a bonus feat. At 4th level and every 4 levels, add new conditions.

classFeatures.name: Unarmed Strike
classFeatures.description: Gain Improved Unarmed Strike as a bonus feat. Unarmed attacks deal increased damage (1d6 at 1st).

classFeatures.name: AC Bonus
classFeatures.description: Add Wisdom modifier to AC and CMD while unarmored. +1 bonus at 4th level and every 4 levels.

classFeatures.name: Evasion
classFeatures.description: Take no damage on successful Reflex saves against area effects.

classFeatures.name: Fast Movement
classFeatures.description: +10 ft. enhancement bonus to base speed. Increases by +10 ft. every 3 levels.

classFeatures.name: Maneuver Training
classFeatures.description: Use monk level in place of BAB when calculating CMB.

classFeatures.name: Still Mind
classFeatures.description: +2 bonus on saving throws against enchantment spells and effects.

classFeatures.name: Ki Pool
classFeatures.description: Pool of ki points (1/2 monk level + Wis mod). Spend ki for extra attacks, speed, or AC.

classFeatures.name: Slow Fall
classFeatures.description: Reduce falling damage when within arm's reach of a wall. Distance increases every 2 levels.

classFeatures.name: High Jump
classFeatures.description: Add monk level to Acrobatics checks for jumping. Spend ki for +20 bonus.

classFeatures.name: Purity of Body
classFeatures.description: Immunity to all diseases, including supernatural and magical diseases.

classFeatures.name: Wholeness of Body
classFeatures.description: Heal hit points equal to monk level by spending 2 ki points.

classFeatures.name: Improved Evasion
classFeatures.description: Take only half damage on failed Reflex saves against area effects.

classFeatures.name: Diamond Body
classFeatures.description: Immunity to all poisons.

classFeatures.name: Abundant Step
classFeatures.description: Slip magically between spaces as if using dimension door, costing 2 ki points.

classFeatures.name: Diamond Soul
classFeatures.description: Gain spell resistance equal to monk level + 10.

classFeatures.name: Quivering Palm
classFeatures.description: Set up vibrations that can be fatal. Target must make a Fortitude save or die.

classFeatures.name: Timeless Body
classFeatures.description: No longer takes ability score penalties for aging.

classFeatures.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
classFeatures.description: Can speak with any living creature.

classFeatures.name: Empty Body
classFeatures.description: Assume an ethereal state for 1 minute by spending 3 ki points.

classFeatures.name: Perfect Self
classFeatures.description: Become a magical creature. Gain DR 10/chaotic and treated as an outsider.

name: Oracle
description: Mysterious divine casters touched by otherworldly power. Oracles gain mysteria revelations and spontaneous casting.

classFeatures.name: Oracle Curse
classFeatures.description: Cursed with power, gaining curse and abilities.

classFeatures.name: Oracle Mystery
classFeatures.description: Gain divine power from a mystery.

classFeatures.name: Oracle Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells spontaneously.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Good
classFeatures.description: Aura of good power equal to paladin level.

classFeatures.name: Detect Evil
classFeatures.description: At-will ability to use detect evil as the spell.

classFeatures.name: Smite Evil
classFeatures.description: Add Cha bonus to attack and paladin level to damage against evil targets. 1/day, +1 use every 3 levels.

classFeatures.name: Divine Grace
classFeatures.description: Add Charisma modifier to all saving throws.

classFeatures.name: Lay on Hands
classFeatures.description: Heal 1d6 per 2 paladin levels by touch. Uses: 1/2 paladin level + Cha modifier per day.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Courage
classFeatures.description: Immune to fear. Allies within 10 feet gain +4 morale bonus on saves against fear.

classFeatures.name: Divine Health
classFeatures.description: Immune to all diseases, including supernatural and magical diseases.

classFeatures.name: Mercy
classFeatures.description: Remove conditions when using Lay on Hands. New mercies at 3rd and every 3 levels.

classFeatures.name: Channel Positive Energy
classFeatures.description: Channel positive energy like a cleric, using 2 uses of lay on hands.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells from the paladin spell list. Caster level equals paladin level - 3.

classFeatures.name: Divine Bond
classFeatures.description: Form a divine bond with a weapon (granting enhancement bonuses) or a mount.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Resolve
classFeatures.description: Immune to charm spells and effects. Allies within 10 feet gain +4 morale bonus on saves against charm.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Justice
classFeatures.description: Expend 2 uses of smite evil to grant smite evil to all allies within 10 feet.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Faith
classFeatures.description: Weapons are treated as good-aligned. Allies within 10 feet also overcome good DR.

classFeatures.name: Aura of Righteousness
classFeatures.description: Gain DR 5/evil and immunity to compulsion. Allies within 10 feet gain +4 on saves vs compulsion.

classFeatures.name: Holy Champion
classFeatures.description: DR increases to 10/evil. Smite evil banishes evil outsiders. Channel/lay on hands heal maximum.

classFeatures.name: Favored Enemy
classFeatures.description: +2 bonus on Bluff, Knowledge, Perception, Sense Motive, Survival, attack and damage against chosen type. Additional enemies at 5th and every 5 levels.

classFeatures.name: Track
classFeatures.description: Add half level (minimum 1) to Survival checks to track.

classFeatures.name: Wild Empathy
classFeatures.description: Improve attitude of animals using 1d20 + ranger level + Cha modifier.

classFeatures.name: Combat Style Feat
classFeatures.description: Select archery or two-weapon combat. Gain bonus feats at 2nd, 6th, 10th, 14th, 18th level.

classFeatures.name: Endurance
classFeatures.description: Gain Endurance as a bonus feat.

classFeatures.name: Favored Terrain
classFeatures.description: +2 bonus on initiative, Knowledge (geography), Perception, Stealth, Survival in chosen terrain. Additional terrains at 8th and every 5 levels.

classFeatures.name: Hunter's Bond
classFeatures.description: Form a bond with companions (share favored enemy bonus) or gain an animal companion.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells from the ranger spell list. Caster level equals ranger level - 3.

classFeatures.name: Woodland Stride
classFeatures.description: Move through natural difficult terrain at normal speed.

classFeatures.name: Swift Tracker
classFeatures.description: Track at normal speed without penalty, or at double speed at -10.

classFeatures.name: Evasion
classFeatures.description: Take no damage on successful Reflex saves against area effects (light/medium/no armor only).

classFeatures.name: Quarry
classFeatures.description: Denote a target as quarry. +2 insight bonus on attacks, auto-confirm criticals, take 10 on Survival to track.

classFeatures.name: Camouflage
classFeatures.description: Use Stealth to hide in any favored terrain, even without cover.

classFeatures.name: Improved Evasion
classFeatures.description: Take only half damage on failed Reflex saves against area effects.

classFeatures.name: Hide in Plain Sight
classFeatures.description: Use Stealth in any favored terrain while being observed.

classFeatures.name: Improved Quarry
classFeatures.description: +4 insight bonus on attacks against quarry, take 20 on Survival to track, free action to select.

classFeatures.name: Master Hunter
classFeatures.description: Standard action to attack favored enemy at full BAB. Target must Fort save or die.

classFeatures.name: Sneak Attack
classFeatures.description: Deal +1d6 extra damage when target is denied Dex bonus or flanked. Increases by +1d6 every 2 levels.

classFeatures.name: Trapfinding
classFeatures.description: Add 1/2 level to Perception checks to locate traps and Disable Device checks.

classFeatures.name: Evasion
classFeatures.description: Take no damage on successful Reflex saves against area effects (light/no armor only).

classFeatures.name: Rogue Talent
classFeatures.description: Gain a rogue talent at 2nd level and every 2 levels thereafter.

classFeatures.name: Trap Sense
classFeatures.description: +1 bonus on Reflex saves and AC against traps. Increases by +1 every 3 levels.

classFeatures.name: Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be caught flat-footed. Retains Dex bonus to AC even against invisible attackers.

classFeatures.name: Improved Uncanny Dodge
classFeatures.description: Cannot be flanked unless attacker has 4+ more rogue levels.

classFeatures.name: Advanced Talents
classFeatures.description: Can choose from advanced rogue talents in place of normal talents.

classFeatures.name: Master Strike
classFeatures.description: When dealing sneak attack damage, target must Fort save or be put to sleep, paralyzed, or slain.

name: Shaman
description: Spiritual healers communing with nature spirits. Shamans gain spirits and can spontaneously cast healing spells.

classFeatures.name: Spirit
classFeatures.description: Bonded with a spirit.

classFeatures.name: Shamanic Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells spontaneously.

classFeatures.name: Spirit Animal Companion
classFeatures.description: Gain animal companion.

name: Skald
description: Battle-hardened bards who inspire allies in combat. Skalds gain rage powers and can share performance bonuses with party.

classFeatures.name: Weapon and Armor Proficiency
classFeatures.description: Proficient with common weapons and armor.

classFeatures.name: Bardic Performance
classFeatures.description: Inspire allies through performance.

classFeatures.name: Rage Power
classFeatures.description: Gain rage powers like a barbarian.

name: Slayer
description: Deadly assassins and monster hunters with studied targets. Slayers gain sneak attack and specialization against chosen foes.

classFeatures.name: Studied Target
classFeatures.description: Study chosen target, gaining bonuses against it.

classFeatures.name: Sneak Attack
classFeatures.description: Gain sneak attack damage.

classFeatures.name: Slayer Talents
classFeatures.description: Gain special assassination and combat abilities.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast arcane spells spontaneously from sorcerer spell list.

classFeatures.name: Bloodline
classFeatures.description: Choose a bloodline granting powers and spells.

classFeatures.name: Bloodline Arcana
classFeatures.description: Special arcana from your bloodline.

classFeatures.name: Cantrips
classFeatures.description: Cast unlimited 0-level spells.

classFeatures.name: Eschew Materials
classFeatures.description: Can cast spells without material components.

classFeatures.name: Bloodline Power
classFeatures.description: Gain a power from your bloodline. Additional bloodline spells at every odd level.

classFeatures.name: Bloodline Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus feat from your bloodline's list. Additional feats at 13th and 19th.

classFeatures.name: Bloodline Power
classFeatures.description: Gain a new bloodline power.

classFeatures.name: Bloodline Power
classFeatures.description: Gain a new bloodline power.

classFeatures.name: Bloodline Power
classFeatures.description: Gain your final, most powerful bloodline ability.

name: Summoner
description: Mages who forge bonds with eidolons. Summoners command powerful elemental companions in battle.

classFeatures.name: Eidolon
classFeatures.description: Bond with an eidolon.

classFeatures.name: Summoner Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast arcane spells.

classFeatures.name: Summoning
classFeatures.description: Summon allies to aid you.

name: Swashbuckler
description: Dashing swordmasters focused on precise strikes and panache. Swashbucklers gain deeds and panache pool mechanics.

classFeatures.name: Panache
classFeatures.description: Pool of panache points for deeds.

classFeatures.name: Deeds
classFeatures.description: Perform swashbuckling deeds.

classFeatures.name: Weapon Training
classFeatures.description: Bonus with light melee weapons.

name: Warpriest
description: Holy warriors who blend martial prowess with divine magic. Warpriests gain sacred weapon enhancements and channel energy.

classFeatures.name: Sacred Weapon
classFeatures.description: Bond with a sacred weapon.

classFeatures.name: Blessings
classFeatures.description: Gain divine blessings from deity.

classFeatures.name: Warpriest Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast divine spells.

name: Witch
description: Enigmatic spellcasters bonded to mystical familiars. Witches gain hexes and curse abilities to weaken enemies.

classFeatures.name: Familiar
classFeatures.description: Gain a familiar to enhance abilities.

classFeatures.name: Hexes
classFeatures.description: Cast magical hexes.

classFeatures.name: Witch Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast arcane spells.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: Cast prepared arcane spells from wizard spell list.

classFeatures.name: Spellbook
classFeatures.description: Record spells in spellbook for later study.

classFeatures.name: Arcane Bond
classFeatures.description: Bond with object or familiar to enhance casting.

classFeatures.name: Arcane School
classFeatures.description: Specialize in school of magic for bonus spells and abilities.

classFeatures.name: Cantrips
classFeatures.description: Cast unlimited 0-level spells.

classFeatures.name: Scribe Scroll
classFeatures.description: Write arcane scrolls containing spells.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain a bonus feat every 5 levels.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain another bonus feat.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain another bonus feat.

classFeatures.name: Bonus Feat
classFeatures.description: Gain another bonus feat.
